use.flag: Add support for OpenCL for CPU
Use the legacy Mesa OpenCL 1.x driver which has been removed.
Use the closed source driver for Intel® CPUs with at least SSE4.2.
Use the Compute Runtime driver for OpenCL 3.0 and Gen12 and newer. HW compatibility list: https://github.com/intel/compute-runtime/tree/25.40.35563.4#supported-platforms
Use the closed driver for OpenCL 1.x/2.x for GCN 1/2/3.
Add generic CPU support for OpenCL 3.0. HW compatibility list: https://github.com/pocl/pocl/blob/v7.1/README.md
Use the newer Mesa OpenCL 3.0 implementation.
